title: CreateNeo
description: Create modpack of neo-forge compatible mods for Minecraft.
body:
![CreateNeo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4b5ab28b2aab297df1310ce53793579ce88a207.png)
#
### CreateNeo
is a Neoforge modpack designed for optimizing Create and its Addons. The pack itself is not centered around the Create mod and will branch out to other things like magic mods and combat mods. We recomend not adding any extra mods as it could break the game or mess with the optimization mods.
# 

<details>
<summary>Notable Mods</summary>

[🟩Embeddium](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium)\

</details>
